name: design
description: Comprehensive design skill: brand identity, design tokens, UI styling, logo generation (55 styles, Gemini AI), corporate identity program (50 deliverables, CIP mockups), HTML presentations (Chart.js), banner design (22 styles, social/ads/web/print), icon design (15 styles, SVG, Gemini 3.1 Pro), social photos (HTML→screenshot, multi-platform). Actions: design logo, create CIP, generate mockups, build slides, design banner, generate icon, create social photos, social media images, brand identity,
author: nextlevelbuilder
summary_zh: 这是一款全能设计工具，能借助AI快速生成品牌标志、视觉规范、样机、幻灯片及营销图文。它省去了从零搭建品牌视觉的繁琐工作，适合需要高效产出全套品牌物料的营销与设计场景。
